# IdeaForge System Map

## Pipeline

```
raw → captured → explored → reviewed → researched → prd_written → arch_written → plan_written → built
```

| State | Description | Artifacts |
|-------|-------------|-----------|
| `raw` | User has shared a raw idea, nothing structured yet | — |
| `captured` | Idea has been clarified and saved as a structured spec | memory/ideas_store.json#latest(stage=structured) |
| `explored` | 10 directions generated, top 3 picked, user chose one | idea_storage/{slug}-{timestamp}/overview.txt, idea_storage/{slug}-{timestamp}/selected.txt |
| `reviewed` | Idea stress-tested across 4 dimensions, verdict issued | memory/ideas_store.json#latest(review.verdict) |
| `researched` | Market research complete — competitors, validation signals, gaps identified | docs/PRODUCT_SENSE.md |
| `prd_written` | PRD written — problem, users, solution, MVP features, constraints defined | docs/product-specs/mvp.md, docs/product-specs/index.md |
| `arch_written` | Architecture designed — components, data flow, tech stack, key decisions | ARCHITECTURE.md |
| `plan_written` | Build plan created — phases, milestones, dependencies, risks | docs/exec-plans/active/mvp-build-plan.md |
| `built` | GitHub repo created, all docs and conductor system pushed | memory/ideas_store.json#latest(github_url), memory/ideas_store.json#latest(stage=built) |

## Agents

| # | Name | Description | Inputs | Outputs | Skills | Depends On | File |
|---|------|-------------|--------|---------|--------|------------|------|
| 6 | **arch-writer** | Reads the PRD and designs the system architecture | docs/product-specs/mvp.md, memory/ideas_store.json | ARCHITECTURE.md | clarify-before-write | prd-writer | `agents/arch-writer-6.md` |
| 8 | **build-orchestrator** | Creates GitHub repo and pushes all planning docs + conductor system | memory/ideas_store.json, docs/product-specs/mvp.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/exec-plans/active/mvp-build-plan.md, docs/design-docs/ (decision documents) | GitHub repository | save-built-state | plan-writer | `agents/build-orchestrator-8.md` |
| 1 | **idea-capturer** | Captures a raw idea and turns it into a structured project spec | — | memory/ideas_store.json | ask-questions, save-idea | — | `agents/idea-capturer-1.md` |
| 2 | **idea-explorer** | Explores 10 directions for an idea, picks top 3, lets user choose | memory/ideas_store.json | idea_storage/{slug}-{timestamp}/ | elaborate, ask-questions, explore-directions, create-idea-storage-folder | idea-capturer | `agents/idea-explorer-2.md` |
| 7 | **plan-writer** | Breaks PRD + Architecture into a phased, realistic build plan | docs/product-specs/mvp.md, ARCHITECTURE.md | docs/exec-plans/active/mvp-build-plan.md | clarify-before-write | arch-writer | `agents/plan-writer-7.md` |
| 5 | **prd-writer** | Turns a structured idea + review into a buildable PRD | memory/ideas_store.json, docs/PRODUCT_SENSE.md | docs/product-specs/mvp.md, docs/product-specs/index.md | clarify-before-write | researcher | `agents/prd-writer-5.md` |
| cross-cutting | **project-manager** | Captures key decisions incrementally after each pipeline stage | memory/ideas_store.json, docs/product-specs/mvp.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/exec-plans/active/mvp-build-plan.md | docs/design-docs/ (multiple decision documents) | — | — | `agents/project-manager.md` |
| 4 | **researcher** | Researches competitors, market signals, and validation before the PRD | memory/ideas_store.json, docs/{idea.name}/DECISIONS.md | docs/PRODUCT_SENSE.md | — | strategist | `agents/researcher-4.md` |
| 3 | **strategist** | Stress-tests a structured idea across 4 dimensions and decides if it's ready to build | memory/ideas_store.json | memory/ideas_store.json | load-idea, review-dimensions, save-review | idea-explorer | `agents/strategist-3.md` |

## Skills

| Name | Description | Inputs | Outputs | Side Effects | Called By | File |
|------|-------------|--------|---------|-------------|----------|------|
| **ask-questions** | Generates 5–7 clarifying questions to understand what the user is talking about. Use when planner or idea agent needs to understand problem, users, solution, scope, success metrics, or constraints. Do NOT ask about tech stack — that is decided later during scaffolding. | — | — | — | idea-capturer, idea-explorer, --- | `skills/ask-questions/SKILL.md` |
| **check-repo-status** | Checks actual GitHub repo state (commits, issues, PRs, branches) for real-time context. Used by /pick-another and /existing-idea to ground idea status in reality, not just planned state. | github_url: string (e.g.,  "https://github.com/inayathnoon/learnbridge"), idea_slug: string (for matching to memory) | repo_status: object (commits count,  latest commit,  open/closed issues,  PR state), divergence: array (places where repo state differs from ideas_store.json) | — | pick-another command, existing-idea command, --- | `skills/check-repo-status/SKILL.md` |
| **clarify-before-write** | Before writing a doc (PRD, Architecture, Build Plan), identify anything not yet decided that the doc requires. Ask the user only what's needed. Skip if everything is already clear. | — | — | — | prd-writer, arch-writer, plan-writer, --- | `skills/clarify-before-write/SKILL.md` |
| **create-idea-storage-folder** | Creates idea_storage folder with overview, directions, and 3 direction subfolders. Use when planner has top 3 directions ready and needs to persist them for the user. | — | idea_storage/{slug}-{timestamp}/ | creates folder and direction files | idea-explorer, --- | `skills/create-idea-storage-folder/SKILL.md` |
| **elaborate** | Asks user to elaborate when a raw idea has unclear or missing parts. Use when user shares a vague idea, planner or idea agent needs gaps filled, or anything is assumed rather than stated. | — | — | — | idea-explorer, --- | `skills/elaborate/SKILL.md` |
| **explore-directions** | Generates 10 distinct directions an idea could take, picks the top 3 most interesting, and identifies the 1 closest to what the user described. Run as a single step. | — | — | — | idea-explorer, --- | `skills/explore-directions/SKILL.md` |
| **generate-idea-index** | Creates auto-generated docs/{idea}/INDEX.md with status, timestamps, and links to all idea documents | idea_slug: string (e.g.,  "learnbridge"), docs_dir: string (absolute path to docs/{idea}/) | index_file: string (path to created INDEX.md), summary: object (idea status,  last updated,  doc count) | Creates docs/{idea}/INDEX.md if missing, Overwrites existing INDEX.md (idempotent) | build-orchestrator (stage 8), project-manager (finalization), --- | `skills/generate-idea-index/SKILL.md` |
| **load-idea** | Loads the latest idea from memory/ideas_store.json. Use when review or build agent needs to read structured idea and optional review data. | memory/ideas_store.json | — | — | strategist, --- | `skills/load-idea/SKILL.md` |
| **review-dimensions** | Scores idea across Clarity, Feasibility, Differentiation, Completeness. Use when review agent needs to evaluate a structured idea and produce verdict. | — | — | — | strategist, --- | `skills/review-dimensions/SKILL.md` |
| **save-built-state** | Updates memory/ideas_store.json with stage=built and github_url. Use after the build orchestrator has created the GitHub repo. | — | memory/ideas_store.json | writes file | build-orchestrator, --- | `skills/save-built-state/SKILL.md` |
| **save-idea** | Saves structured idea to memory/ideas_store.json. Use when idea agent has produced a structured spec and needs to persist it. | — | memory/ideas_store.json | writes file | idea-capturer, --- | `skills/save-idea/SKILL.md` |
| **save-review** | Saves review to memory/ideas_store.json. Use when review agent has produced scores, verdict, and refined_mvp_features. | — | memory/ideas_store.json | writes file | strategist, --- | `skills/save-review/SKILL.md` |
| **web-research** | Structured web research with search → fetch → extract → cite pipeline. Used by researcher agent to find competitors, validation signals, market data with proper sourcing. | query: string (search query,  e.g.,  "best ecommerce platforms 2026"), max_results: integer (how many sources to review,  default 5), focus_areas: array (what to extract,  e.g.,  ["competitors",  "pricing",  "user reviews"]) | findings: object (structured research findings), sources: array (list of sources with URLs), confidence: string (high/medium/low based on search freshness) | — | researcher-4, --- | `skills/web-research/SKILL.md` |

## Transitions

| From | To | Agent | Pre-checks | Post-checks |
|------|----|-------|------------|-------------|
| `raw` | `captured` | idea-capturer | — | memory/ideas_store.json contains new idea with stage=structured |
| `captured` | `explored` | idea-explorer | memory/ideas_store.json contains idea with stage=structured | idea_storage/{slug}-{timestamp}/ exists with direction files |
| `explored` | `reviewed` | strategist | memory/ideas_store.json contains idea with direction chosen | memory/ideas_store.json contains review with verdict |
| `reviewed` | `researched` | researcher | review verdict = approved | docs/PRODUCT_SENSE.md populated with market research |
| `researched` | `prd_written` | prd-writer | docs/PRODUCT_SENSE.md exists | docs/product-specs/mvp.md exists |
| `prd_written` | `arch_written` | arch-writer | docs/product-specs/mvp.md exists | ARCHITECTURE.md exists at repository root |
| `arch_written` | `plan_written` | plan-writer | ARCHITECTURE.md exists | docs/exec-plans/active/mvp-build-plan.md exists |
| `plan_written` | `built` | build-orchestrator | review verdict = approved, docs/exec-plans/active/mvp-build-plan.md exists | GitHub repo created, memory/ideas_store.json has stage=built and github_url |
